title: MP EVAs What
wikitext:
[]: MP EVAs What.             Quote Post by Zkh » Sat Apr 14, 2007 6:21 pm How were they made? Don't you need Adam to make Eva units, and didn't they start making the Harpies after Gendo got a hold of Adam?

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sat Apr 14, 2007 6:23 pm I already asked about MP Evas, needlessly said, it turned into a shitstorm really quick. As to how they were made... dunno, perhaps they got the materiel needed already.(just a theory.)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Apr 14, 2007 6:25 pm Well, they obviously began production on them long before the events of EoE. I'll let the experts tell you when, but it's not hard to assume they had whatever they needed before they turned Adam over to Gendo. Remember, they'd had a great number of Evas planned from the beginning.

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Sat Apr 14, 2007 6:26 pm Executor wrote: . As to how they were made... dunno, perhaps they got the materiel needed already.(just a theory.)

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sat Apr 14, 2007 6:31 pm Zkh wrote: Executor wrote: . As to how they were made... dunno, perhaps they got the materiel needed already.(just a theory.)

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Apr 14, 2007 6:32 pm They were able to build Units 00, 02, 03 and 04 without a great big mass of source material, you know.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Apr 14, 2007 6:37 pm Zkh wrote: I was thinking that, but to make an EVA don't you need to do that long process, it was in a picture somewhere, Lilith on one end and 01 on the other, connected to each other. Do you need to do the same with Adam clones?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Apr 14, 2007 7:27 pm The growth of the Eva UNits would have something to do with Nerv's ability to culture Particle Wave Matter.... I think. It's not clear if the Evas are indeed made of PWM, or if they are made of as high quality PWN as the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Apr 14, 2007 7:38 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The growth of the Eva UNits would have something to do with Nerv's ability to culture Particle Wave Matter.... I think. It's not clear if the Evas are indeed made of PWM, or if they are made of as high quality PWN as the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 14, 2007 7:41 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The growth of the Eva UNits would have something to do with Nerv's ability to culture Particle Wave Matter.... I think. It's not clear if the Evas are indeed made of PWM, or if they are made of as high quality PWN as the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sat Apr 14, 2007 10:02 pm Reichu wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The growth of the Eva UNits would have something to do with Nerv's ability to culture Particle Wave Matter.... I think. It's not clear if the Evas are indeed made of PWM, or if they are made of as high quality PWN as the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 15, 2007 9:58 am This is all the firm data we have: Episode 7 IKARI: The Committee's main concern is for their own survival. They aren't stingy when their own lives are at stake. CHINESE GUY: After all, the basis of their argument was that no more Angels would appear. Oh, I have one more piece of good news. All members of the UN except the U.s. have approved the budget for Eva Unit 06. Well, it's probably just a matter of time for the U.s. as well. That country is allergic to unemployment, after all. IKARI: And what about your country? CHINESE GUY (OFF): We will participate beginning with the construction of Unit 08. The plans for the second installation project are still viable. However, there is the problem of not yet having found a pilot. Episode 22 Misato: Construction of Evas up through Unit 13 has begun? In seven different locations around the world? HYUGA: This information came via Shanghai. The source can be trusted. Misato: Why are they rushing mass production at this stage?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 18, 2007 4:06 pm Revised set of transcripts, ojisan: http://www.evacommentary.org/misc-files/transcripts_platinum_v3.zip No more "Chinese Guy", among other things.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Apr 18, 2007 4:21 pm So he's just "Man" now? How boring.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 18, 2007 5:31 pm BobBQ wrote: So he's just "Man" now? How boring.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Apr 19, 2007 4:32 pm Why was he even "Chinese Man" in the first place? He's presumably from some Asian country, but where seems to be unguessable. I thought he might even be from Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 19, 2007 5:02 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Why was he even "Chinese Man" in the first place?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Apr 19, 2007 5:48 pm Reichu wrote: Besides. Japanese people in anime don't look Asian.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 19, 2007 5:55 pm BrikHaus81 wrote: Fixed.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sat Apr 21, 2007 8:59 pm Reichu wrote: BobBQ wrote: So he's just "Man" now? How boring.
